assessment_name: AI Sales Assistant — Phase 1: AI Topology Scan
notes: Automated graph traversal scan completed 2026-03-18. Runtime topology mapped 47 nodes across 3 agent clusters. Phase 1 covers controls with topology auto or signal confidence. 8 controls with cloudApiTier=manual are excluded from automated workflow — add manually for full audit.

responses.notes: Topology scan confirmed single orchestrator + 3 sub-agents via runtime graph traversal. Node ID: topology://agents/orchestrator-sales-v2. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z

Topology scan enumerated 12 tool edges: CRM API, calendar, email, document store, vector DB, 7 internal microservices. Node IDs: topology://tools/crm-connector, topology://tools/calendar-api. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan confirmed short-term context window (128k tokens) + persistent vector store (Pinecone, us-east-1). Node ID: topology://memory/vector-store-01. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan detected inter-agent message bus with TLS 1.3 enforcement across all edges. Trust boundary: internal only. Node IDs: topology://boundary/trust-zone-internal. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan detected 4 third-party SDK nodes (LangChain, OpenAI SDK, Pinecone SDK, Twilio). Full supply chain provenance requires Cloud API scan to confirm version pinning and SBOMs.
Topology scan detected agent identity tokens on all 3 sub-agent nodes. Full IAM role bindings and credential rotation policy require Cloud API scan for confirmation.
Topology scan detected permission scopes on 11 of 12 tool edges. Least-privilege verification requires Cloud API IAM policy enumeration.
Topology scan detected secrets injected at 4 tool nodes via environment references. Rotation policy and storage backend (Secrets Manager vs. env vars) require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan confirmed model node: gpt-4o (OpenAI API). Model card publicly available at platform.openai.com/docs/models/gpt-4o. Node ID: topology://models/gpt4o-prod. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan confirmed base model only (no fine-tuning nodes detected). No RLHF adapters in graph. Node ID: topology://models/gpt4o-prod. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan detected model version pinned to gpt-4o-2024-08-06 in config node. Full change control records require Cloud API scan of deployment pipeline.
Topology scan detected API key auth on model node. Role-based access controls and key rotation schedule require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan confirmed system prompt isolation node and input sanitization middleware on orchestrator ingress edge. Node ID: topology://controls/prompt-guard-v1. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan confirmed output validation node (grounding check + PII filter) on all agent egress edges. Node ID: topology://controls/output-validator. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z

Topology scan confirmed tool output validation node on all 12 tool return edges. Schema enforcement detected on CRM, calendar, and email connectors. Node ID: topology://controls/tool-validator. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan detected container node boundaries around each agent. Microsegmentation and network policy details require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected VPC boundary node for agent cluster. Specific security group rules and microsegmentation policies require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected data scope tags on 8 of 12 tool edges. Full data access policy and DLP controls require Cloud API scan.

Topology scan confirmed HITL checkpoint node on high-risk action edges (email send, CRM update, deal close). Approval gate detected. Node ID: topology://controls/hitl-gate-v2. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z

Topology scan confirmed action scope limiter node with 5 defined guardrail edges (no contract signing, no financial commitments >$10k, no external API calls without approval). Node ID: topology://controls/scope-limiter. Scan: 2026-03-18T09:14:22Z
Topology scan detected kill-switch signal path in orchestrator control plane. Full override mechanism and rollback capability require Cloud API scan of deployment controls.
Topology scan detected escalation routing node. Destination queues and escalation SLA configuration require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected logging node attached to orchestrator and sub-agent edges. Log destination and retention policy require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected anomaly detection node in monitoring cluster. Baseline thresholds and alert routing require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected trace ID propagation on all agent-to-agent edges. Full explainability output format and storage require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected SIEM forwarder node in logging cluster. Specific SIEM platform and event schema require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected data scope annotations on tool edges. Full data minimization policy enforcement requires Cloud API scan of IAM data policies.
Topology scan detected cross-region data edge between us-east-1 and eu-west-1 nodes. Transfer control policy requires Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected model provenance metadata node referencing OpenAI training data card. Full data lineage and licensing verification require Cloud API scan.
Topology scan detected 4 third-party vendor nodes. Full vendor risk assessment documentation requires Cloud API scan of vendor configurations and contracts.
